channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: U.S. national anthem booed before NBA, NHL games in Canada despite tariff pause
item.description: TORONTO (AP) — Fans booed the American national anthem before NHL and NBA games in Canada on Tuesday night, a sign that some Canadians were still upset despite President Donald Trump’s 30-day pause on tariff threats against Mexico and Canada.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: NFL replacing 'End Racism' message in end zones for Super Bowl LIX
item.description: The NFL says its social justice message, "End Racism," commonly seen in the end zones of stadiums across the league, is being replaced with a new message for Super Bowl LIX in New Orleans
item.dc:creator: Olivia Johnson, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Simona Halep announces her retirement at age 33 after two Grand Slam titles and a return from a ban
item.description: Two-time Grand Slam champion Simona Halep announced her retirement from tennis at age 33 after a first-round loss at a tournament in her home country of Romania on Tuesday, ending an injury-filled comeback from a doping suspension.
item.dc:creator: HOWARD FENDRICH, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Chiefs' Andy Reid admits feeling 'old' as Super Bowl matchup against son of former Eagles star looms
item.description: Andy Reid is familiar with coaching against his former team, the Philadelphia Eagles, but this Sunday's big game will present a unique matchup for the coach.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Davis joins Mavericks, offers nod to magnitude of deal that sent Doncic to Lakers
item.description: Anthony Davis gave up a $6 million bonus as part of the seismic trade that brought him to the Dallas Mavericks and sent Luka Doncic to the Los Angeles Lakers in a rare swap of superstars.
item.dc:creator: SCHUYLER DIXON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Brittney Griner could face 1-year window to take advantage of new talent on Atlanta Dream roster
item.description: ATLANTA (AP) — New Atlanta Dream star Brittney Griner says her one-year deal was based on more than just positioning herself for a bigger contract when the WNBA's new collective bargaining agreement is expected to take effect in one year.
item.dc:creator: CHARLES ODUM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Luka Doncic details Lakers trade 'shock' at introductory press conference
item.description: Los Angeles Lakers star Luka Doncic was introduced as a member of the team Tuesday afternoon. The team acquired him from the Dallas Mavericks.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Art of the deal: The biggest trades in Bay Area sports history
item.description: Bay Area teams have a rich history of big-time trades that have included the likes of Joe Montana, Willie Mays, Rickey Henderson and Joe Thornton.
item.dc:creator: Jerry McDonald, The Mercury News

item.title: Eagles' Brandon Graham expects to play in Super Bowl LIX after what he thought was career-ending injury
item.description: Philadelphia Eagles pass-rusher Brandon Graham thought his career was over after tearing his triceps in November, but he's making a push to play in the Super Bowl.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: When will Luka Doncic debut with the Lakers? Soon, but not before his calf strain is totally healed
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — The Los Angeles Lakers’ acquisition of Luka Doncic has altered the future of a franchise that had been trying to squeeze one more championship run out of 40-year-old LeBron James’ partnership with Anthony Davis.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: The 2025 Super Bowl commercials already catching attention
item.description: Super Bowl Sunday isn't here yet, but some of the commercials set to air during the game have already been released.
item.dc:creator: Addy Bink, NewsNation

item.title: Caleb Williams voted GQ's most stylish football player
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — Chicago Bears quarterback Caleb Williams has earned his first accolade since joining the NFL as the league's No. 1 overall pick last April. He took home GQ's fan vote for the Most Stylish Football Player Monday.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: MLB ump fired amid gambling probe
item.description: Major League Baseball has fired an umpire as part of an investigation into sports gambling. Umpire Pat Hoberg was fired after it was revealed he shared betting accounts with a friend who bet on baseball, according to ESPN reporter Jesse Rogers and later confirmed by the league.
item.dc:creator: Travis Schlepp, KTLA 5

item.title: Meet the puppies representing San Diego in 2025 Puppy Bowl
item.description: Just ahead of the Super Bowl LIX matchup between the Kansas City Chiefs and the Philadelphia Eagles, the Puppy Bowl XXI kicks off Super Bowl Sunday with a morning competition between hundreds of rescue puppies.
item.dc:creator: Anna Ashcraft, Fox 5

item.title: Jazz trade Mills and Eubanks for Bamba and Tucker
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Five days before the NBA trade deadline, the Utah Jazz have made a deal with the Los Angeles Clippers. The Jazz have acquired center Mo Bamba, forward P.J.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Crosby's overtime goal beats Utah HC, 3-2
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (AP) - Sidney Crosby scored with 1:06 left in overtime as the Pittsburgh Penguins beat the Utah Hockey Club 3-2 at Delta Center on Wednesday. It was Crosby's 95th career game-winning goal, moving him past Steve Yzerman for the 13th most in NHL history.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4
